title: clinopodium libanoticum
intro: Clinopodium libanoticum is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It is commonly known as mountain mint and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Clinopodium libanoticum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as ointments and salves.
